title: WordPress Website Development
description: Custom WordPress website design and development with responsive layout, SEO optimization, and content management integration.

milestones.title: Design Approval
milestones.description: Wireframes and mockups approved by client

pricing.name: Basic
pricing.description: Standard WordPress setup with pre-built theme customization

pricing.name: Professional
pricing.description: Custom theme development with advanced features

pricing.name: Premium
pricing.description: Full custom development with e-commerce integration

requirements: Client provides brand assets (logo, colors, fonts)
Client provides content (text, images) for all pages
assumptions: Client responds to feedback within 48 hours
Two rounds of revisions included per milestone
Hosting and domain costs are separate
risks: Content delays from client may extend timeline
Plugin conflicts may require additional development time
Third-party API rate limits may affect functionality

title: E-commerce Store Setup
description: Complete Shopify or WooCommerce e-commerce store setup with product catalog, payment integration, and shipping configuration.

milestones.title: Design & Setup
milestones.description: Store design approved and basic setup complete

milestones.title: Testing & Launch
milestones.description: QA testing, bug fixes, and go-live

pricing.name: Starter
pricing.description: Shopify basic setup with standard theme

pricing.name: Growth
pricing.description: Custom Shopify theme with advanced features

pricing.name: Enterprise
pricing.description: WooCommerce custom build with multi-vendor support

requirements: Client provides product images and descriptions
Client provides shipping rates and zones
assumptions: Product count does not exceed 50 for Starter tier
Third-party app subscriptions are client's responsibility
risks: Complex product configurations may require additional time
Platform policy changes may affect functionality

title: SEO Audit & Strategy
description: Comprehensive SEO audit with actionable recommendations, competitor analysis, and a 6-month optimization roadmap.

milestones.title: Audit Complete
milestones.description: Full technical and on-page audit delivered

pricing.name: Basic
pricing.description: Technical audit only with basic recommendations

pricing.name: Standard
pricing.description: Full audit with keyword research and competitor analysis

requirements: Client provides website access (CMS, analytics, search console)
Client provides current SEO data if available
assumptions: Website has at least 100 pages for meaningful analysis
Client has Google Analytics and Search Console set up
Implementation is separate from audit engagement
risks: Limited website data may reduce audit accuracy
Client implementation delays may impact results
